Consulted DeepWiki on reduce_tile API, split_work_to_cores, DST register cycle, and scaler tile preparation. Key findings: REDUCE_COL accumulates across rows for each column, scaler fills row0 of each face, split_work_to_cores divides into two groups for remainder handling.
